attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
*
FROM
(
SELECT 
SCRH.AAR_NUMBER AS BK_AWAITING_AUTHORIZATION_NUM,
(CASE WHEN
NCWP_C.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY IS NOT NULL
OR 
NCWP_RM.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY IS NOT NULL
OR
NCWP_FD.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY IS NOT NULL
OR
NCWP_VP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY IS NOT NULL
THEN 'Y'
ELSE 
'N'
END)                RMA_REQUEST_APPROVAL_REQD_ROLE,
COALESCE(SCRH.SUBMITTED_ON , CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))		RMA_REQUEST_SUBMIT_DTM,
CAST(RMA_REQUEST_SUBMIT_DTM AS DATE) DV_RMA_REQUEST_SUBMIT_DT,
COALESCE(EVCRD.RETURN_TYPE, 'UNKNOWN') RMA_REQUEST_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(EVCRD.RETURN_STATUS, 'UNKNOWN') RMA_REQUEST_STATUS_CD,
WICI.CONTACT_EMAIL RMA_REQUESTOR_EMAIL_ADDR,
SCRH.CREATED_BY		RMA_REQUESTOR_CCO_ID,
COALESCE(NSO_ORIG.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-9999)                  	ORIGINAL_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
SCRH.ADDITIONAL_RETURN_NOTES		CUSTOMER_RETURN_CMT_TXT,
SCRH.CSOPS_NOTES					QUEUE_ADMIN_CMT_TXT,
COALESCE(EVCRD.RETURN_REASON,'UNKNOWN') BK_CUSTOMER_RETURN_REASON_CD,
COALESCE(NSO_RMA.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-9999)                			APPROVED_RMA_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
COALESCE(NCWP_C.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999)        	RU_APPRVR_AREA_CTRLR_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE(NCWP_RM.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999)       	RU_APPRVR_RGNL_MGR_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE(NCWP_FD.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999)       	RU_APPRVR_DIRECTOR_PRTY_KEY,
EVCRD.DENIAL_REASON RU_RMA_REQ_DENIAL_REASON_CD, 
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)                 			EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER                                 			EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)                 			EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER                			EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
COALESCE(SCRH.UPDATED_ON,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00.000000' AS TIMESTAMP(6))) AS LAST_MODIFIED_DTM,
CAST (LAST_MODIFIED_DTM AS DATE ) DV_LAST_MODIFIED_DT,
COALESCE (SCRH.RESTOCKING_FEE_PERCENTAGE , -999.00) RESTOCKING_FEE_PCT,
(CASE WHEN SCRH.RETURN_STATUS =13 THEN SCRH.UPDATED_ON  ELSE  CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00.000000' AS TIMESTAMP(6)) END   )  AS RMA_APPROVED_DTM,
CAST (RMA_APPROVED_DTM AS DATE ) AS DV_RMA_APPROVED_DT ,
COALESCE(SCRH.CSOPS_CASE_NUMBER, 'UNKNOWN')   CRM_CASE_NUM,
SCRH.CREATED_BY AS RQST_CREATED_BY_NAME,
SCRH.EXPEDITE_FLAG AS EXPEDITE_FLG,
COALESCE(SCRH.HOLD_FLAG,'N') AS HOLD_FLG,
'UNKNOWN' AS XX_APPROVER_ID,
COALESCE(APPROVED_BY_PROXY,'UNKNOWN') AS XX_APPROVED_BY_PROXY_ID,
'I'  ACTION_CODE,
'I'  DML_TYPE,
EVCRD.DENIAL_REASON_CODE DENIAL_REASON_CODE,
COALESCE(NCWP_VP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999)       	RU_APPRVR_VICE_PRES_PRTY_KEY
FROM $$STGDB.ST_DMP_CO_RETURN_HEADER SCRH
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_DMP_CO_RETURN_DETAILS EVCRD 
ON EVCRD.RETURN_ID = SCRH.RETURN_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CO_RETURN_CONTACT_DTLS WICI
ON WICI.RETURN_ID = EVCRD.RETURN_ID
LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP_FD
 ON (EVCRD.FIN_DIR_EMAIL_ADDR=NCWP_FD.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP_RM
 ON (EVCRD.REGIONAL_MNGR_EMAIL_ADDR=NCWP_RM.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP_C
 ON (EVCRD.AREA_CNTRLR_EMAIL_ADDR=NCWP_C.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP_VP
 ON (EVCRD.FIN_VC_PRES_EMAIL_ADDR=NCWP_VP.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS)
LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_SALES_ORDER_AAR_RMA_NUM NSO_RMA
ON (SCRH.AAR_NUMBER=NSO_RMA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_RMA_AAR_NUM) 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO_ORIG
ON (SCRH.ORIG_SALES_ORDER_NUMBER=NSO_ORIG.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
AND NSO_ORIG.END_TV_DATETIME ='3500-01-01 00:00:00')
 
 UNION ALL

SELECT 
ECRH.AAR_NUMBER AS BK_AWAITING_AUTHORIZATION_NUM,
(CASE WHEN
NCWP_C.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY IS NOT NULL
OR 
NCWP_RM.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY IS NOT NULL
OR
NCWP_FD.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY IS NOT NULL
OR
NCWP_VP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY IS NOT NULL
THEN 'Y'
ELSE 
'N'
END)                RMA_REQUEST_APPROVAL_REQD_ROLE,
COALESCE(ECRH.SUBMITTED_ON , CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))		RMA_REQUEST_SUBMIT_DTM,
CAST(RMA_REQUEST_SUBMIT_DTM AS DATE) DV_RMA_REQUEST_SUBMIT_DT,
COALESCE(EVCRD.RETURN_TYPE , 'UNKNOWN') RMA_REQUEST_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(EVCRD.RETURN_STATUS , 'UNKNOWN') RMA_REQUEST_STATUS_CD,
WICI.CONTACT_EMAIL RMA_REQUESTOR_EMAIL_ADDR,
ECRH.CREATED_BY		RMA_REQUESTOR_CCO_ID,
COALESCE(NSO_ORIG.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-9999)                  	ORIGINAL_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
ECRH.ADDITIONAL_RETURN_NOTES		CUSTOMER_RETURN_CMT_TXT,
ECRH.CSOPS_NOTES					QUEUE_ADMIN_CMT_TXT,
COALESCE(EVCRD.RETURN_REASON,'UNKNOWN') BK_CUSTOMER_RETURN_REASON_CD,
COALESCE(NSO_RMA.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-9999)                			APPROVED_RMA_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
COALESCE(NCWP_C.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999)        	RU_APPRVR_AREA_CTRLR_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE(NCWP_RM.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999)       	RU_APPRVR_RGNL_MGR_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE(NCWP_FD.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999)       	RU_APPRVR_DIRECTOR_PRTY_KEY,
EVCRD.DENIAL_REASON RU_RMA_REQ_DENIAL_REASON_CD, 
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)                 			EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER                                 			EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)                 			EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER                			EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
COALESCE(ECRH.UPDATED_ON,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00.000000' AS TIMESTAMP(6))) AS LAST_MODIFIED_DTM,
CAST (LAST_MODIFIED_DTM AS DATE ) DV_LAST_MODIFIED_DT,
COALESCE (ECRH.RESTOCKING_FEE_PERCENTAGE , -999.00)  RESTOCKING_FEE_PCT,
(CASE WHEN ECRH.RETURN_STATUS =13 THEN ECRH.UPDATED_ON  ELSE  CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00.000000' AS TIMESTAMP(6)) END   )  AS RMA_APPROVED_DTM,
CAST (RMA_APPROVED_DTM AS DATE ) AS DV_RMA_APPROVED_DT ,
COALESCE(ECRH.CSOPS_CASE_NUMBER, 'UNKNOWN')   CRM_CASE_NUM,
ECRH.CREATED_BY AS RQST_CREATED_BY_NAME,
ECRH.EXPEDITE_FLAG AS EXPEDITE_FLG,
COALESCE(ECRH.HOLD_FLAG,'N') AS HOLD_FLG,
'UNKNOWN' AS XX_APPROVER_ID,
COALESCE(APPROVED_BY_PROXY,'UNKNOWN') AS XX_APPROVED_BY_PROXY_ID,
'I'  ACTION_CODE,
'I'  DML_TYPE ,
EVCRD.DENIAL_REASON_CODE DENIAL_REASON_CODE,
COALESCE(NCWP_VP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999)       	RU_APPRVR_VICE_PRES_PRTY_KEY
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_DMP_CO_RETURN_HEADER ECRH
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_DMP_CO_RETURN_DETAILS EVCRD 
ON EVCRD.RETURN_ID = ECRH.RETURN_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CO_RETURN_CONTACT_DTLS WICI
ON WICI.RETURN_ID = EVCRD.RETURN_ID
LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP_FD
 ON (EVCRD.FIN_DIR_EMAIL_ADDR=NCWP_FD.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP_RM
 ON (EVCRD.REGIONAL_MNGR_EMAIL_ADDR=NCWP_RM.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP_C
 ON (EVCRD.AREA_CNTRLR_EMAIL_ADDR=NCWP_C.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP_VP
 ON (EVCRD.FIN_VC_PRES_EMAIL_ADDR=NCWP_VP.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS)
LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_SALES_ORDER_AAR_RMA_NUM NSO_RMA
ON (ECRH.AAR_NUMBER=NSO_RMA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_RMA_AAR_NUM) 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO_ORIG
ON (ECRH.ORIG_SALES_ORDER_NUMBER=NSO_ORIG.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
AND NSO_ORIG.END_TV_DATETIME ='3500-01-01 00:00:00' )
)RMAH
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY RMAH.BK_AWAITING_AUTHORIZATION_NUM ORDER BY RMAH.RMA_REQUEST_SUBMIT_DTM DESC)=1

SEL SALES_ORDER_KEY,
SALES_ORDER_LINE_RMA_AAR_NUM FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV
WHERE END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00:00:00'
AND SS_CODE='CG'
AND SALES_ORDER_LINE_RMA_AAR_NUM LIKE 'AAR%'
GROUP BY 1,2
/*UNION
SEL SALES_ORDER_KEY,SALES_ORDER_RMA_AA_NUM as SALES_ORDER_LINE_RMA_AAR_NUM
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_V1_TV  
WHERE END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00'
AND SS_CD<>'CG'
GROUP BY 1,2*/

SELECT
*
FROM
(
SELECT 
 SCRH.BATCH_ID, 
 SCRH.RETURN_ID, 
 SCRH.AAR_NUMBER, 
 SCRH.RETURN_STATUS, 
 SCRH.ACTIVE, 
 SCRH.RETURN_REASON, 
 SCRH.RETURN_FROM_COUNTRY_CD, 
 SCRH.RETURN_TYPE, 
 SCRH.ORIG_DEAL_ID, 
 SCRH.ORIG_WEB_ORDER_ID, 
 SCRH.ORIG_SALES_ORDER_NUMBER, 
 SCRH.ORIG_ERP_HEADER_ID, 
 SCRH.ORIG_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER, 
 SCRH.ORIG_SALES_ORDER_BOOKED_DATE, 
 SCRH.ORG_ID, 
 SCRH.INVOICE_TO_SITE_USE_ID, 
 SCRH.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID, 
 SCRH.PRICE_LIST_ID, 
 SCRH.CURRENCY_CODE, 
 SCRH.APPLICATION_FLOW, 
 SCRH.RESTOCKING_FEE_PERCENTAGE, 
 SCRH.ADDITIONAL_RETURN_NOTES, 
 SCRH.ORDER_TOTAL, 
 SCRH.SUBMITTED_ON, 
 SCRH.SUBMITTED_BY, 
 SCRH.SUBMITTED_BY_PROXY, 
 SCRH.CREATED_ON, 
 SCRH.CREATED_BY_PROXY, 
 SCRH.CREATED_BY, 
 SCRH.UPDATED_ON, 
 SCRH.UPDATED_BY, 
 SCRH.CSOPS_CASE_NUMBER, 
 SCRH.CSOPS_NOTES, 
 SCRH.CSOPS_CUSTOMER_NOTES, 
 SCRH.SHARE_NODE_ID, 
 SCRH.APPLICATION_SUB_FLOW, 
 SCRH.CREATE_DATETIME, 
 SCRH.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, 
 SCRH.REFRESH_DATETIME, 
 SCRH.ACTION_CODE, 
 'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE,
 SCRH.EXPEDITE_FLAG,
 SCRH.HOLD_FLAG
FROM
 
 $$STGDB.ST_DMP_CO_RETURN_HEADER  SCRH
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_DMP_CO_RETURN_DETAILS EVCRD1
 ON SCRH.RETURN_ID = EVCRD1.RETURN_ID
 WHERE NOT EXISTS 
 (
 SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EV_DMP_CO_RETURN_DETAILS EVCRD
 WHERE EVCRD.RETURN_ID = SCRH.RETURN_ID
 )
 OR NOT EXISTS 
 (
 SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_CO_RETURN_CONTACT_DTLS WICI
 WHERE WICI.RETURN_ID = SCRH.RETURN_ID
 )
 OR NOT EXISTS
( 
SELECT 1 FROM 
 $$STGDB.WI_SALES_ORDER_AAR_RMA_NUM  NSOV1
 WHERE SCRH.AAR_NUMBER=NSOV1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_RMA_AAR_NUM
)
OR 
(NOT EXISTS
(
 SELECT 1 FROM
 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO
 WHERE SCRH.ORIG_SALES_ORDER_NUMBER=NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
 AND NSO.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00:00:00'
)
 AND SCRH.ORIG_SALES_ORDER_NUMBER IS NOT NULL    /* Modified for Q3FY15   */
)
OR NOT EXISTS
(
 SELECT 1 FROM 
 $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP_FD
 WHERE  (EVCRD1.FIN_DIR_EMAIL_ADDR=NCWP_FD.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS)
)
OR NOT EXISTS
(
 SELECT 1 FROM
 $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP_RM
 WHERE (EVCRD1.REGIONAL_MNGR_EMAIL_ADDR=NCWP_RM.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS)
)
OR NOT EXISTS
(
 SELECT 1 FROM
 $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP_C
 WHERE  (EVCRD1.AREA_CNTRLR_EMAIL_ADDR=NCWP_C.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS) 
 
 ))EXRMA
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY EXRMA.AAR_NUMBER  ORDER BY EXRMA.SUBMITTED_ON DESC)=1

SELECT GCRC.CONTACT_ID, GCRC.RETURN_ID, GCRC.CONTACT_EMAIL 
FROM
 $$GGSRCVWDB.GG_DMP_CO_RETURN_CONTACT GCRC
 WHERE EXISTS(
 SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_DMP_CO_RETURN_HEADER SCRH
 WHERE SCRH.RETURN_ID =GCRC.RETURN_ID
 )
 OR EXISTS(
  SELECT 1 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_DMP_CO_RETURN_HEADER ECRH
 WHERE ECRH.RETURN_ID =GCRC.RETURN_ID
 )
